title: Team collaboration and Product Areas
summary: Forge Method now guides multi-person product work with Product Areas, trunk-based planning, collaboration handoffs, and repo split planning.
highlights: New collaboration workflows help teams define GitHub org/repo shape, owners, review policy, agent usage, and release cadence before parallel build work.
Product Areas are now the product-facing ownership boundary, kept separate from Forge Modules used by the runtime itself.
Repo split planning now requires owner, contract, validation, release boundary, and integration evidence before creating a standalone Method Project.
Story, sprint, status, and handoff templates now support optional Product Area, owner, branch, PR, dependency, and handoff fields without adding solo-project overhead.
